title: oenothera micrantha var. acuminata
intro: Oenothera micrantha var. acuminata, also known as a variety of the evening primrose, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant is rich in omega-6 fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Oenothera micrantha var. acuminata include soothing skin irritations, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, and it may also help to improve cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into oil, capsules, or teas, and are often used to support women's health and alleviate symptoms of menopause, PMS, and eczema.
